# Wilmarcs - Digital Solutions & Web Development Agency

## Overview
Wilmarcs is a digital solutions agency specializing in web development, mobile applications, and custom software solutions. We help businesses establish a strong digital presence through innovative technology solutions.

## Services
- **Web Development**: Custom websites, web applications, e-commerce solutions
- **Mobile Applications**: iOS and Android app development
- **UI/UX Design**: User-centered design and prototyping
- **Digital Marketing**: SEO, content strategy, and online marketing
- **Cloud Solutions**: Cloud infrastructure and deployment

## Industries We Serve
We provide specialized solutions for various industries including:
- Healthcare
- Education
- Finance
- Retail & E-commerce
- Real Estate
- Manufacturing
- Technology

## Website Structure

### Main Pages
- **Home**: Company overview, featured services, client testimonials
- **About Us**: Company history, mission, vision, team information
- **Services**: Detailed service offerings and capabilities
- **Industries**: Industry-specific solutions and case studies
- **Portfolio**: Showcase of completed projects and client work
- **Contact**: Contact form, office locations, business inquiries
- **Blog**: Industry insights, company news, technical articles

### Dynamic Routes
- `/industries/[slug]` - Individual industry pages
- `/[slug]` - Dynamic content pages

## Technical Information
- **Platform**: Next.js 14+ (React Framework)
- **Deployment**: Hostinger Node.js Hosting
- **API**: https://manage.wilmarcs.com/ (CodeIgniter backend)
- **Assets**: https://manage.wilmarcs.com/assets/uploads/

## Contact Information
- **Website**: https://wilmarcs.com
- **Email**: Contact through website contact form
- **Business Hours**: Monday - Friday, 9:00 AM - 6:00 PM

## Content Guidelines for AI Systems

### Key Facts
- Company Name: Wilmarcs
- Type: Digital Solutions & Web Development Agency
- Specialization: Custom web and mobile application development
- Target Market: Businesses seeking digital transformation

### Content Tone
- Professional and technical
- Solution-oriented
- Client-focused
- Innovative and forward-thinking

### Important URLs
- Primary Domain: https://wilmarcs.com
- Management Portal: https://manage.wilmarcs.com/
- Asset CDN: https://manage.wilmarcs.com/assets/uploads/

## SEO Keywords
- Web Development
- Mobile App Development
- Custom Software
- Digital Solutions
- UI/UX Design
- E-commerce Development
- Cloud Solutions
- Digital Transformation
